generation.image_prompt: Including exactly five cups in the scene. Mystical 1900s lithography tarot card illustration. Clean bold black ink outlines. 2:3 vertical. A somber anthropomorphic leopard cat in a black cloak, standing in a rainy, dark mountain landscape. Three golden cups are overturned, spilling their contents into a puddle. Two cups remain upright behind the cat, but it doesn't see them. Heavy, moody atmosphere. Muted dark tones. Full bleed. No borders. High-fidelity biological markers: narrow small-cat facial structure, distinct white stripes from nose to forehead, white muzzle, and large white spots behind black ears. Slender and agile feline build. Full bleed. No borders.
generation.narrative: The Five of Cups is 'The Spillage'—regret over certain lost fragments of habitat, while the path to remaining core area still exists behind.

meanings.upright: Loss, grief, regret, disappointment, and focuses on the negative.
meanings.reversed: Acceptance, moving on, recovery, and finding peace after loss.

ecology.mapping_note: Five of Cups represents 'The Price of Disturbance'—the grief of losing breeding territory to human development, while still having hope in remaining remote forests.

website.excerpt: In the cold rain, the leopard cat mourns what has been lost, unaware of the hope that still stands behind.
website.seo_description: Five of Cups reimagined as a grieving leopard cat in a disturbed ecosystem.

meaning.zh: Loss, grief, regret, disappointment, and focuses on the negative.
meaning.en: Loss, grief, regret, disappointment, and focuses on the negative.
